titleStmt.title: SII 30.101: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 101. (A.R. No. 178 of 1915.) Tirumukkūḍal, Madhurantakam Taluk, Chingleput District. Veṅkaṭēśa Perumāḷ temple-on the west, south and east walls of the same shrine Rājarāja-Chōḻa I: year 28, day 141: 1040 A.D.

summary.p: This record begins with the praśasti of Rājarāja I. It records the decision taken by the assembly of Madhurāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a village in Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻamaṇḍalam which met in the hall called Sembiyaṉmahādēvi Perumaṇḍapam which was built in the brahmasthāna of the village by the king. The sabhā agreed to remit the taxes on certain temple lands from the interest on the gold which they received from the temple treasury. The details of the temple lands with boundaries are specified. Rāman Tiruvirāmīśvaraṉ alias Alaṅgārādittaṉ, the madhyasta of the Mādhavach-chēri, who was also an accountant of the samvatsara-vāriyam and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyun tanakke Urimai pūṇṭamai manakkoḷak kāntaḷurccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyun taṭikaipāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamu meṇṭicai pukaḻtara vīḻamaṇṭalamu Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai yilakkamun=tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷarūḻiyu ḷellā yāṇṭun toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkovirājarāja rājakesaripanmarāna śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattut taniyūr śrīmadhurān=takacaturvvetimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom nāḷ 100 4 10 1 ṉāl nam Ūr brahmasdhānattu nam Uṭaiyāreṭuppittaruḷiya śrīcempiyaṉ mahādevip perumaṇṭapattu Āsabālavṛdhar nirampa peruṅkuṟi kūṭiyiruntu nammuṭaiya śrīmukkūṭalā
ḻvār śrībhaṇṭārattu palicaikkuk koṇṭa poṉ mutal nūṟṟuk kaḻañcu Ippoṉ nūṟṟuk kaḻañciṟ palicai koṇṭu Iṟai Iṟuppatāṉa nilam Ivvāḻvār tirunāmattāl vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya tūṇinilam Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākaik kūṭalūrk kaḻaniyil puruṣottama vāykkālukku vaṭakku 2āṅ kaṇṇāṟṟut tiruveṅkaṭavatikkuk kiḻakku mutaṟcatirattu śrīgovin=taccerik kāñcai vāmanakrimavi(y)ttan pakkal vilaikoṇṭa pāṭakam 3m Iṅke 2āñ catirattu vaṭakkil 4lil meṟkaṭaiya Ivaniṭaiye vilaikoṇṭa pāṭakam 1 m Iṅke 3ām kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu teṟkil 4 lil meṟkaṭaiya Ivvūr vaikhānasan kāśyapa naraciṅka paṭṭaṉiṭai vilaikoṇṭa pāṭakam 2 m Iṅke kiḻakkaṭaiya śrīdāmotara
cceri kāśyapaṉ vāmanakramavi(y)ttanu mivan tampi paṭṭaya kramavi(y)ttaniṭaiyum vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya pāṭakam 2 m Iṅke 4 lāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcatirattut teṟkaṭaiya śrīgovin=taccerik kārāmpicceṭṭiḷaiyadoṇaya kramavi(y)ttaniṭai vilaikoṇṭa pāṭakam 2m Iṅke teṟkil 4 lil vaṭakkaṭaiya 2 l meṟkaṭaiya śrīmādhavacceri vaṅkippuṟattup paṟpanāpa kramavi(y)ttaniṭai vilaikoṇṭa pāṭakam 1 m Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakku 2 ṅ kaṇṇāṟṟut tiruvekampavatikkuk kiḻakku 5 Āñ caturattu vaṭakkaṭaiya veḷḷā ḷan=tāmaṉn=tamaṭattān tirumāliṭai vilaikoṇṭa pāṭakam 5 m Iṅke 6āñ caturattu melai 4 lil vaṭakkaṭaiya śrīdāmotaraccerik kīḻkāvilc caṅkaranārāyaṇa kramavi(y)ttaniṭai vilai koṇṭa pāṭakam 2ṟā yum Iṅke
7 Āñ caturattu vaṭakkil 4 lilk kiḻakkaṭaiya Ivvūr vaikhānasan bhāradvāji paṟpanāpaniṭai vilaikoṇṭa pāṭakam 2m 8 Āñcaturattu vaṭakkil 4 lil meṟkaṭaiya Ivaniṭaiye vilaikoṇṭa pāṭakam 1m Iṅke 3 Āṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu 5āñ caturattut teṟkaṭaiya śrīmadhusūdanaccerik kāñcikkuṟi mādhava kramavi(y)ttaniṭai vilaikoṇṭa pāṭakam 4 lum Ippiṭākaip pullampākkatuk kaḻaṉiyil puruṣottama vāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟut tiruvekampavatikku meṟku 6 Āñ caturattu vaṭakkil 4 lil meṟkaṭaiya śrīnārāyaṇaccerik kuñcappavvilk kaṇṇāṟṟut tiruvaraikuṉṟu vatikku meṟku mutaṟcatirattu
vaṭakkaṭaiya māvil kiḻakkaṭaiya Ivaniṭaiye vilai koṇṭa pāṭakam 2 m Ākap pāṭakam 2 10 6 � pāṭakattālum van=ta nilattukku Ināḷ mutal cantraādittaval Ūriṟaiyum Uḻaviṟaiyu maṟṟumepperp paṭṭa Iṟaiyu mippoṉṉiṟ palicaiye koṇṭu Inilattukku Iṟaiyiṟuttuk kuṭuppomāka śilālekai ceyyap paṇittom peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom Ivai paṇiyāl Ivvāṇṭu samvatsaravāriyak kaṇakkeḻutukiṉṟa śrīmādhavacceri maddhyastan Irāman tiruvirāmiśvaranāna Alaṅkārātittaneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu paṇiyāl śrīkesavacceri maddhyastan caṅkaran tāmotaraneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu paṇiyāl śrīnārāyaṇacceri maddhyastan muvāyirava nampaṅkāṭanāṉa Ēḻāyiravaneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu paṇiyāl śrīgovin=ta
cceri maddhyastan Ātittan perumān Aiyāyirattirunūṟṟuvaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu paṇiyāl śrīviṣṇucceri maddhyastan cūṟṟi tiruvakattiyeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu paṇiyāl madhusūdanacceri maddhyastan kāṭan poṉviṇṇaneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu paṇiyāl(t) tiruvikkiramacceri maddhyastan brahmapriyanāna kaṟpakatten Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu paṇiyāl śrīṛṣikeśavacceri maddhyastan tāmotaran subrahmaṇyanāna brahmapriyaneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu paṇiyāl paṟpanāpacceri maddhyastan comāci te
vaneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 30.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
